description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single Deploy stage and a before_script that changes to /home/gitlab-runner/deploy, fetches the latest commit, checks out the branch $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and pulls it. Add a Digital Ocean job in the Deploy stage that runs manually on branches, uses the tag deploy, and executes /usr/local/bin/dep/deployer.phar deploy digital-ocean --branch="$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME". Add a Google Cloud job similarly that runs manually on branches and runs /usr/local/bin/dep/deployer.phar deploy google-cloud-platform --branch="$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME". Add a Tag All job that runs manually on tags, uses the tag deploy, and runs /usr/local/bin/dep/deployer.phar deploy all --tag="$CI_COMMIT_TAG".
